message:
fix: ShouldExportJSONL reads DB directly, returns false in dolt-native mode

ShouldExportJSONL was going through GetSyncMode which reads config.yaml
via viper. When viper loaded from the wrong directory context, it returned
git-portable instead of dolt-native, causing stale JSONL files to be
written. Now reads the database config directly, matching the approach
already used by ShouldImportJSONL.

Fixes bd-ap3b4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
